Home / Services / Home Additions

Home Additions

Expand your living space with a seamless home addition.

Need more space in your Nashville home? Campbell Contracting specializes in home additions, seamlessly integrating new living areas into your existing structure. Whether you're looking to add a new bedroom, a larger kitchen, a sunroom, or a home office, we can help you create the space you need without the hassle of moving.

We understand the challenges of home additions in Nashville, including zoning regulations and structural considerations. We work closely with you to develop a design that meets your needs and complies with local building codes. We also ensure the addition blends seamlessly with your existing home, both aesthetically and structurally.

Our services include design, foundation work, framing, roofing, electrical, and plumbing. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial planning to final inspection. We use high-quality materials and pay close attention to detail to ensure a durable and beautiful addition. We can help you choose the right materials, colors, and finishes to create a space that feels like a natural extension of your home.

We also obtain all necessary permits and ensure compliance with Nashville building codes. Our team is experienced with all aspects of home addition construction, including foundation work, framing, roofing, and interior finishes.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your needs, budget, and desired style to create a detailed addition plan.
  2. 02 Step 2: Permitting and Approvals – We handle all necessary permits and approvals from the city of Nashville.
  3. 03 Step 3: Construction – Our skilled team builds the addition with precision and quality craftsmanship.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches – We complete the interior and exterior finishes, ensuring a seamless integration with your existing home.

Benefits

  • Increased Living Space
  • Enhanced Home Value
  • Improved Functionality
  • Custom Design

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a home addition take?

The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but most home additions in Nashville take between 4 to 12 months.

What are the zoning regulations for home additions in Nashville?

Zoning regulations vary depending on your neighborhood. We can help you navigate the zoning process and ensure your addition complies with all regulations.

How much does a home addition cost?

The cost varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but typically ranges from $150 to $300 per square foot.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with home additions? Contact us today.
